title: Oairse 3 Pcs Christmas Gold Artificial Hydrangea Flowers 68cm Fake Flower Floral Arrangements Bouquets Faux Hydrangea Stems for Christmas Decoration Wedding Party Centerpieces
features: Package and Size - Total 3 pieces come in a pack (Vase not included). Artificial gold hydrangea flower total height 68cm/26.8inches. Each one flower head approx 16cm in diameter. Long stem will look beautiful in a big floor vase or tall jar, and it is made of metal and plastic, if the stem is too long for your vase, You can bend or cut them to adjust the size as needed.

Material - Golden faux hydrangea flower petals and flowers leaves are made of high-quality plastic, with a real touch and clear veins. The Color Spray Technology is adopted to create a natural color in flower petals. Covered with stunning gold color, which make the flowers more attractive and add more holiday atmosphere. And artificial hydrangea are the best choice for people with pollen allergies and low immunity.

Variety of Uses - Different from ordinary artificial flowers, the surface of our flowers exudes golden luster, very high-end, suitable for use in grand festivals, ceremonies and occasions. Perfect for flower arrangements, centerpieces and great for indoor decoration, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day, Wedding Ceremony, Party, Office or Home Decoration, Altar, Church, Corsages, Pew bows, Reception centerpieces, or everyday, it is also a perfect gift for your friends.

Easy to Care - These Christmas tree filler branches can keep long lasting beauty and fresh, it is odorless, non-toxic, and won't fade easily, you can place this glittery stems on anywhere, it can be used for several Christmas seasons and don't need to spend time to maintain as they never die or fade. Bringing beauty and good mood to your day, they are a great addition to your every seasons displays!

Christmas Glitter Leaves Stems - This Christmas floral picks branches will make great addition to your Christmas and holiday decorations, are ideal to decorate your Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, etc. Besides, it can also work as Christmas vases or pots filler for table centerpiece, DIY bouquets, custom your Christmas gift packages, these artificial Christmas tree picks sprays will be an essential Xmas decoration in your home
